name: @forgeax/hello-sprite
description: 2D sprite + Layer + transparent-sort double-scene demo (feat-20260520-2d-sprite-layer-mvp / M-4 / w28..w33).

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT (mirrors hello-tonemap / hello-cube). hello-sprite exercises the sprite material pipeline end-to-end (HANDLE_QUAD + SpriteMaterialAsset + Layer/SortKey components + transparent-sort + sprite.wgsl + alpha-blend pipeline) across 2 scenes (mode=0 horizontal-z + mode=1 JRPG Y-sort) crossed with 2 tonemap paths (none + reinhard-extended). 4 reference PNGs gate AC-13 (D-5 wood-container reuse via local assets/ copy when the forgeax-engine-assets submodule is not initialised; commit copies are 1.4 KB).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-app + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu sizes already tracked at the package level; demo workspace declares no separate bundle-size baseline

fps.reason: fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room / hello-app gates that run the default zero-overhead path; sprite transparent-bucket cost is gated by runtime bench (transparent-sort.bench.ts) instead

bench.reason: perf-critical bench (transparent-sort 10k entities) is anchored at @forgeax/engine-runtime#forgeax.metrics.bench, not at the demo workspace; demo gates on smoke + 4 reference PNG byte-equivalence eps<=0.05

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the M-4 double-scene 2D-sprite-layer demo (feat-20260520 AC-12 / AC-13)
